title: WidgetManifest
description: Declarative manifest exported alongside a widget's element class. Identifies the widget, declares its isolation mode, capability and topic permissions, and the JSON schema its per-instance config must satisfy. See specs/crosscut/widgets.md for full specification.

widgetId.description: Globally unique widget identifier, kebab-case, dot-separated by owning module (e.g. 'content.announcements').

displayName.description: Human-readable label used in admin UI.

description.description: Optional longer description for the widget picker.

configSchema.description: JSON schema id identifying the shape of per-instance config. The host resolves this id in its schema registry and validates config before mount.

isolation.description: Isolation mode the host uses when mounting this widget. 'inline' = light DOM; 'shadow' = closed shadow root; 'iframe' = sandboxed iframe with postMessage bridge.

capabilities.description: Names of capabilities this widget is permitted to invoke through the capability bridge. The host denies any invocation whose name is not listed.

provides.description: Mediator topics this widget may publish or answer.

consumes.description: Mediator topics this widget may subscribe to.

slots.description: Slot names in which this widget is permitted to be placed. Omit to allow any slot.

deferredStates.description: Surface-contract states (per frontend constitution C4) that this widget explicitly does not implement, with a rationale. Used so the conformance checker can skip them.

$comment: Enforces INV-WIDGET-01 (required fields) and the grammar for widgetId and capability names used by INV-WIDGET-02/03. See specs/crosscut/widgets.md.
